docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF KARIN GRIER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SANDRA LOUIE IS PRESENT. WITNESS FOR THE DEFENDANT ROSA MELENDEZ, FARMER'S INSURANCE AGENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GRIER, KARIN AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, SANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED AUG-20-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, SANDRA
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRIER, KARIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOUIE, SANDRA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2020 - JUDGMENT.
